へへっ、どうだ！ 人間たちには、１歩も近寄らせねぇぞぉ！！: Heh, how's that! Not one step closer to the humans——!!
よし、いい感じにモンスターが集まってきたな！<br>全員、射線を開けろ！:
Good, the monsters are nicely clustered!
Everyone, clear the line of fire!
おっと、こりゃいけねぇ！<br>おらぁ、散れ散れぇ、野郎ども！: Oh, we can't be here! Scatter, scatter, everyone!
さあ、みんなに特大の花火をお見せしようか！: Now then, let me put on a spectacular fireworks show for everyone!
す、すげぇ……！ 一網打尽だ……！<br>やっぱすげぇぜ、シラエスの姐さんはっ！:
Th-that's incredible...! Swept them all up in one shot...!
Big sis Shiraes is something else!!
あたしたちも負けてらんないよ！<br>鬼族の意地、見せてやんな！: We can't fall behind! Show 'em the oni-folk's pride!
（よし、いい具合に士気があがってるな。<br>鬼族たちはもともとタフだし、まだま:
(Good, morale's nicely elevated. The oni-folk are tough by nature,
they've still got plenty left. But...)
（いくらタフだといっても体力は無限じゃない。<br>際限なく押し寄せてくるモンス:
(No matter how tough, stamina is finite. How long can they
last against endless monster waves... that's the problem.)
モンスターを引き寄せる力は健在のようだ。<br>数日分の力が凝縮されていただろう:
The monster-drawing force is still active. Days of
stored energy — no telling when it runs out.
そうか……あまり長引いて疲弊すると、すりつぶされかねないな。<br>……やむを得:
I see... if this drags on and we're worn down, we'll be crushed.
...There's no other choice.
思い切りがいいね。<br>厄介ごとの種ではあっても、貴重な品であることは確かだろ:
Decisive as ever. It may be a source of trouble,
but it's undeniably a valuable artifact.
制御しきれないなら、人類にとっては害悪でしかない。<br>すべての責任は俺がもつ:
If it can't be controlled, it's nothing but a threat to humanity.
I'll take full responsibility. Do it.
ふふ、それでこそ司令官君だ。<br>大事なものを間違わない。:
Hehe, that's the Commander-kun I know.
You never lose sight of what matters.
ただし、クリスタルの破壊に十分な魔力を練るのには時間がかかる。<br>その間、前:
However, building up enough magic to destroy the crystal takes time.
I'll have to pull back from the front line — will you be alright?
――ご心配なく！ いくらでも持ちこたえてみせます！<br>鬼族の誇りにかけて、人:
——No need to worry! We'll hold as long as it takes!
On the pride of the oni-folk, we won't let a single human be harmed!
クレハ……はは、先に言われちまったな。<br>そういうことだから、シラエス、頼ん:
Kureha... haha, you beat me to it.
That settles it, Shiraes. I'm counting on you.
いい返事だ。それじゃあ、任せたよ。<br>必ず一緒に朝を迎えよう。:
Good answer. Then I'll leave it to you.
We'll see the morning together — I promise.
ああ言われたからには、こっちも期待に応えないとな。<br>正念場だぞ！ 全員、気:
Now that she's said that, we have to live up to it.
This is the moment! Everyone, dig deep!
はいっ！ 旦那様に任されたお役目、必ず果たしてみせます！:
Yes! The duty my darling entrusted to me — I will fulfill it without
fail!
ぐぅ……！ まだまだっ！<br>そんなもんじゃ、あたいら鬼族は負けやしないよ！:
Ngh...! Not yet!
That's nowhere near enough to beat us oni-folk!
傷を見せてください――これは応急処置が必要ですね！<br>あなたは１度さがって、:
Show me your wound — this needs first aid!
Step back and get it treated right away!
クレハお嬢……面目ないねぇ……！: Miss Kureha... I'm ashamed of myself...!
（まずいな……！ さすがに鬼族たちも、疲れがでてきてる。<br>重傷者こそまだい:
(This is bad...! Even the oni-folk are showing signs of fatigue.
No severe injuries yet, but more are getting hurt and falling back.)
どういうことだ……？<br>鬼族はおれたちを騙して、殺そうとしてるんじゃなかった:
What's going on...? Weren't the oni-folk supposed to be
tricking us and trying to kill us...?
あんなにぼろぼろになってまで戦って……。<br>あれ……おれたちを守ってくれてる:
Fighting that hard even when they're this beaten up...
Wait... they're protecting us, aren't they...? What's going on?
必死に戦う鬼族たちの姿に、村人たちは困惑する。<br>あれではまるで、身を挺して:
The oni-folk's desperate fighting left the villagers bewildered.
It was almost as if they were risking everything to protect humans...
鬼族は……本当に、おれたちの敵なのか……？: Are the oni-folk... really our enemies...?
（村人たちも、少しずつ気づいてきてるみたいだな。<br>……そうだ。思い込みを捨:
(The villagers are starting to see it...
Right. Let go of assumptions, look, and judge for yourselves.)
やべぇ……！<br>１匹そっちにいったぞぉ！: Watch out...! One got through that way!
鬼族の声にハッとする。鬼族たちの包囲網を突破した１匹のモンスター。<br>目を血:
The oni-folk's shout rang out — one monster had broken through.
Its blood-shot eyes were fixed on... the cowering villagers.
ひっ……！？<br>モ、モンスターがこっちに……！？: Eek...!? The-the monster is coming this way...!?
っ…………！<br>くそっ、ここからじゃ間に合わねぇ……！: Damn...! I can't make it from here in time...!
（まずい……！ シラエスはクリスタルに集中させている……！<br>村人が……！）:
(This is bad...! Shiraes is focused on the crystal...!
The villager...!)
モンスターの爪が村人へと振り下ろされ、赤い血飛沫が散る。<br>無力な村人は、な:
The monster's claws came down, blood spattered.
The helpless villager was at its mercy — or so it should have been.
うぅ……っ、…………？ あ、あれ……？<br>おれ、なんで生きて……？ ……えっ:
Ugh...!? ............? H-huh...?
Why am I... still alive...? ...What!?
――村人が見たのは、その身を盾として<br>振り下ろされたモンスターの爪を受ける:
——What the villager saw was Kureha, shielding him with her own body,
taking the monster's claws upon herself.
どうして……？ ふふ、変なことをおっしゃいますね。<br>友人が危ない目に遭って:
Why...? Hehe, what a strange thing to ask.
If a friend is in danger, it's only natural to help.
友人……？ だ、だって……おれたちは、あんたたちの言い分を<br>信じようともし:
Friends...? B-but... we never even tried to believe
what you were saying...! Why would you go that far...!
……昔、ある人に助けられたことがあるんです。その人は、<br>なんの関係もない私:
...Once, long ago, someone saved me. That person stood up
against those who'd hurt me, with no obligation to do so...
だから……みなさんが私たちをどう思っているかは関係ないんです。<br>私は……私:
So it doesn't matter how you feel about us.
I... we want to protect you!
人間が……大好きだから！<br>そうですよねっ！？: Because we love humans! Isn't that right!?
お嬢の言う通りだ！ てめぇら、気張れよ！<br>人間のみんなは怖いかもしれねぇが:
Miss Kureha's right! Give it everything you've got!
The humans might be scared, but please hold on just a little longer!
ねっ？ みんな、みなさんを助けたくって、一生懸命なんです。<br>だから……私た:
See? Everyone here is giving everything they have to help you.
So please... let us protect you——!
再び前線に飛び出していくクレハを、<br>村人たちは呆然と見送る。:
The villagers watched in stunned silence as Kureha rushed back to
the front.
（へっ……クレハのやつ、古い話しやがって。<br>けど……その気持ちは届いたみた:
(Heh... Kureha going and bringing that old story up.
But... it seems her feelings got through.)
やがて……１人の村人が、予備として集められていた武器を手に取る。<br>それに呼:
Eventually... one villager reached for a weapon from the reserve
cache. One by one, the others followed suit.
……おれたちも戦うぞ！<br>みんな、武器を持て！: ...We're fighting too! Everyone, grab a weapon!
おおっ！ やってやる……やってやるぞ！<br>うぉおおおおおおおおおおおお！: Yeah! We'll do it... we're doing this! WOOOOOOOOOOOO!
村人たちは勇気を奮い立たせ、前線へと加わる。<br>必死に鬼族と肩を並べて戦い始:
The villagers rallied their courage and joined the front line. The
oni-folk stared wide-eyed as humans fought side by side with them.
お、おい！ お前らはそんなことしなくたっていいんだ！<br>ここはおれたちに任せ:
H-hey! You don't have to do this!
Leave it to us and get to somewhere safe...!
いいや、戦わせてくれ！<br>おれたちの力なんて、大したことないかもしれないけど: No, let us fight! Our strength might not amount to much, but...!
友だちだけを戦わせてたんじゃ、末代までの恥だ！<br>おれたちだって、あんたたち:
Leaving friends to fight alone would shame us for generations!
We want to protect you too!!
やっと鬼族のまっすぐで素直な気持ちが通じたな――<br>人間とか鬼族とかの違いな:
The oni-folk's honest, earnest feelings finally got through——
In the end, the difference between human and oni is a small thing...
同胞たちよ！ 人間のみなさんが共に戦ってくれているんだ！<br>ここで意地を見せ:
Brothers and sisters! The humans are fighting alongside us!
Show them what the oni-folk are made of!
さあ！ モンスターを倒しきるまであと少しだ！<br>がんばりどころだぞぉぉぉ！！:
Come on! Just a little more until every last monster is down!
This is where we give it our all!!!
（……正直、村人たちの戦力自体は大した足しにならない。<br>だが――士気が上が:
(...Honestly, the villagers' combat strength doesn't add up to much.
But — when morale rises, soldiers become something else entirely!)
いいぞ！ そのまましのぎ続けろ！<br>時間さえ稼げば、きっとシラエスがクリスタ:
That's it! Keep holding on!
If we buy enough time, Shiraes will surely——
途端、シラエスがその身に溜めた膨大な魔力を解き放つ。<br>閃光が夜空を白く染め:
Shiraes unleashed the enormous magic she had amassed.
A blinding flash bleached the night sky, and a piercing wail rang out.
クリスタルは破壊したよ。これ以上の増援はない。<br>よく戦ったね……君たちは本:
The crystal is destroyed. No more reinforcements.
You've all fought so well... you're all such troopers. I love you.
さあ、モンスターも残るはあと少し――張り切っていってみようか。<br>まずは……:
Now then, just a few monsters left——shall we press on with gusto?
First of all... fire the signal for our counterattack!
さすがです、シラエスママ！: As expected of you, Mama Shiraes!
よし！ 戦力は整った！ 士気も最高潮！<br>こいつは負ける理由がないな！:
Alright! Our forces are assembled! Morale at its peak!
There's absolutely no reason to lose!
最後の仕上げだ！ 隣の仲間を守りながら、殲滅にかかれ！<br>総員……前進っ！！:
Time for the final push! Protect your comrades, wipe them out!
All forces... ADVANCE!!
